name: Firefly
description: A Tier 3 neutral firefly that spends the day resting on high perches and roams the park at night. It is still a valuable source of glowing materials, but its fight is far more manageable than it was in the Backyard.
behavior: During the day it clusters on high shelves, planters, and elevated points around the greenhouse and veggie garden. At night it takes off and covers a broad area before returning to rest at dawn.
interactionWithPlayer: It stays neutral until attacked, but striking one usually wakes up the nearby group as well. Because it often fights from above, the real mistake is not the direct damage but pulling the whole cluster at once.
interactionWithCreatures: Because it rarely drops to ground level, it almost never gets dragged into conflicts with other creatures. If something does reach it, it answers with glowing goo and tries to regain altitude immediately.
strategy: The best plan is to isolate one with a ranged hit before the rest of the group joins in. Pollen Arrows, high-stun tools, and the Ladybuggy water cannon are all excellent at knocking it out of the air and shortening the fight.
inflicts: Its attack deals busting damage and also applies a 50% movement slow for 5 seconds.

abilities.name: Goo Shot
abilities.description: It charges a shot of glowing goo. Weapons cannot block it, but shields can; even on block it still slows you, and it breaks guard if the block is not perfect.
